name: Gala Chicken Breasts
recipeIngredient: 4 Chicken breasts, boned, skinned and halved
recipeInstructions:
In a medium bowl, blend the mayonnaise with 2 tablespoons of the chives, tarragon, salt, and 1 tablespoon of the lemon juice and mustard. Stir in the hard-cooked eggs. Set aside.
Between waxed paper or plastic wrap, use a rolling pin to flatten each chicken breast half to 1/4 inch thickness. Brush each breast half with beaten egg. Spread with about 1/4 cup of the reserved egg salad mixture. Starting at the narrowest edge, carefully roll up each filled breast, turning the side edges under. Place the filled breasts seam-side down in a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking dish.
Mix melted butter with the remaining chives and lemon juice and brush on the chicken. Bake in a preheated 350 degree oven for 30 to 35 minutes, until the chicken is done. Sprinkle with paprika. Makes 8 servings.
